cron.task: Read ids.txt in the project root. Run batch triage for all valid IDs/URLs. Produce per-paper outputs and a compact daily digest from batch_summary grouped by read_decision (READ IN FULL, SKIM, SKIP). Focus on high relevance first, then medium, and include a paper ID for drill-down. Keep the message suitable for Discord or WhatsApp. If there are no new/valid items, report that clearly.
